image.description: Input image to upscale. A publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL or a base64 data URI (data:image/...;base64,...).

target.description: Target resolution in megapixels (1-128). Output is capped at 128 MP.

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output image (0-100). Not relevant for .png outputs.

enhance_details.description: Enhance fine textures and small details.

enhance_realism.description: Improve realism. Recommended for AI-generated images.

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
